name: ORDT.Weft

unions.name: Weft
unions.comment:
Represents a weft in a distributed system. So `Weft (Int)` means that each site is identified by
an `Int`, and `Weft (String)` that each site is identified by a `String`.

values.name: empty
values.comment:
Create a baseline that will always act as a proper lower bound for all the possible instances
of an `EchoWeft`.

    joinLower clock empty == empty

    joinUpper clock empty == clock

values.name: getSiteIndex
values.comment: Get the last operation index for a certain site.

values.name: insertSiteIndex
values.comment: Set the last operation index for a certain site.
values.type: comparable -> Basics.Int -> ORDT.Weft.Weft comparable -> ORDT.Weft.Weft comparable

values.name: joinLower
values.comment: Perform a semi-lattice join on the lower bound of the two wefts.
values.type: ORDT.Weft.Weft comparable -> ORDT.Weft.Weft comparable -> ORDT.Weft.Weft comparable

values.name: joinUpper
values.comment: Perform a semi-lattice join on the upper bound of the two wefts.
values.type: ORDT.Weft.Weft comparable -> ORDT.Weft.Weft comparable -> ORDT.Weft.Weft comparable
